customers_say: Customers find the water purifier provides good water quality and appreciate its installation process. However, the product's reliability is mixed, with some reporting it completely stops working while others say it performs satisfactorily. Moreover, durability is a concern as internal parts frequently get damaged and filters fail within 6 months. Additionally, customers report issues with noise, including a vibrating sound from the purifier, and water leakage problems. The value for money and service receive mixed feedback, with some considering it the best affordable home water purifier while others say it's not worth the cost, and some praising the service while others report poor service.

reviews.author: Boreddy Anvesh Reddy
reviews.title: Kent product review
reviews.body: Good product and good service and technician is kind and best service

reviews.author: Ranjan Shetty
reviews.title: Very good
reviews.body: The installation was very good. Bineesh did a great job and explained everything clearly.

reviews.author: Jignesh Gajjar
reviews.title: Kent Supreme Plus - Best Purifier in Segment
reviews.body: Off course Kent Purifiers are good and this one is one of the best in segment i can say because it provides Alkaline, Copper and UV Led in Tank. Though Storage Capacity is bit small but for our family it suffice. Leakage till date is not observed, easy to use even by daughter do it. No issues till date, genuine service received from company.
